channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: AVAX eyes a move toward $10.35 as momentum builds—two weeks to break resistance or risk a pullback. 📈 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260325-price-prediction-avax-neutral-consolidation-targets-1035-resistance-by #Crypto #AVAX #PricePrediction

item.title: MATIC fights to rebound from a trough; a test of $0.45 could hinge on holding key support. 📈 Will April unlock a recovery or fade stays? https://Blockchain.News/news/20260325-price-prediction-matic-polygon-eyes-045-recovery-by-april #MATIC #Polygon #Crypto
